app.name: Octo Terminal
app.one_liner: An AI-powered all-in-one terminal for vibe coding, integrating multi-project/multi-terminal workflows with built-in Claude, Codex, Ollama, Kimi, document viewers, and AI image generation.

screens.name: Main Workspace
screens.purpose: Hosts multi-project tabs, split terminal/editor/notes/browser panes, AI agent panels, and document viewers.
primary_actions: Launch AI agents (Claude, Codex, Ollama, Kimi)
Open and edit documents (MD, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, PDF, EPUB)

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user data such as terminal sessions, editor content, or AI-generated assets to disk.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for at least one AI agent (e.g., Ollama)
week 1: Implement core Tauri + React shell with terminal emulation
week 1: Integrate basic multi-tab project switching
acceptance_tests: EPUB export modal appears when 2+ compatible files are open and allows reordering before generation.
PM2 panel resizes correctly when dragging the divider and toggles between all-process and selected-process logs.
Terminal input accepts commands without errors on both macOS and Windows.
User can open two projects simultaneously and switch between them via tabs without losing terminal state.
